seoTitle: Edmonton vs Eerwah Vale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Edmonton and Eerwah Vale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Edmonton vs Eerwah Vale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Edmonton and Eerwah Vale.
heading: Edmonton vs Eerwah Vale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Edmonton, Queensland and Eerwah Vale, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Edmonton has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Eerwah Vale (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Edmonton or Eerwah Vale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Edmonton has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Eerwah Vale scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Edmonton scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Eerwah Vale scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Edmonton or Eerwah Vale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Edmonton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
